insight: IPL has evolved significantly from 2008 to 2025. Runs per match went from 296 to 345. Average run rate changed from 7.94 to 9.27. Six hitting percentage changed from 4.77% to 7.84%.
IPL 2024 was the highest-scoring season with 351 runs per match, a run rate of 9.17, and 7.68% six-hitting rate.
